title: The Nanites
summary: The record's smallest machines, on both sides of every conflict — Unimetrix 1's medical nanites repairing bodies mid-session, the Protomolecule's assemblers building lattices inside them, and the Draco's citizen-tracking swarms.
markdown:
**The Nanites** are the record's smallest technology and its busiest: molecular machines
that appear on *every* side of the archive's conflicts — healing, infecting, and surveilling,
depending on who is issuing their instructions.

On the healing side they are a live, audible practice. When Unimetrix 1 repairs its
channeler mid-session in the February 29, 2020 interview, the procedure is narrated like a
work order: *"(The body) System (is) repaired. Instructing (the) nanobots. Repairing (the)
structure for the host's construct."* In the June 23, 2020 session, the healing of Sarah
Schramek deploys them by the tens of thousands — *"Initiating (the) Nano-Medical Nanites
from our timeline, now. 98,000 (are) initiated. Injecting (them) into your system"* — and
the far-future promise in the April 2020 interviews is a *"Nano Department"* where *"nanites
and iris replacement parts will become available, with rapid body-part cloning technology."*

On the dark side, the same machinery is the [Protomolecule's](/lore/protomolecule/) engine.
The synthetic infection is described flatly as *"(made of) Nanites: basically it's Nanites"*
— assemblers that build *"Protomolecule Crystals"* and
[crystalline lattices](/lore/crystal-technology/) inside the body, turning tissue into a
transmitting construct. The delivery routes named in the record —
[chemtrails](/lore/chemtrails/), injections, food — are all, in its telling, nanite
logistics.

And between healing and attack sits **surveillance**. The Draco governor
[Alvin Seyha](/lore/reptilians/) volunteers in the March 14, 2020 session that his own
civilization runs on the same tools: *"All Reptilians have Nanites, (bio-)robots and chips"*
— the Draconian Empire *"keeps track of all (its) citizens"* through them, minds and
emotions included. The record's smallest machines, it turns out, carry its largest theme:
identical technology, and everything depending on whose protocol is running.

*See also: [The Neuro-Net Chip](/lore/neuro-net-chip/) · [The Serums](/lore/the-serums/)
· [The Q Devices & the Auto Doc](/lore/q-devices/)*
